title: Key events in Kerala today: Job fair, Kathakali, world literary meet mark May 23
content: Kollam Fatima Mata National College: Job Fair conducted jointly by Isaact India and Fatima Mata National College Placement Cell. 9:00 am. Puntalathazham SMD Public School: District Olympic Karate Championship. 9:30 am. Karbala Junction Khadi Grama Vyavasaya District Office: Special Rebate Fair. 10:00 am. Kottayam Kottayam PWD Rest House Auditorium: Inauguration of the District Conference of Kerala State Police Pensioners Welfare Association. Speaker of the Legislative Assembly, Thiruvanchoor Radhakrishnan - 10:15 am. Press Club Auditorium: Inauguration of Lima World Literary Meet. Speaker Thiruvanchoor Radhakrishnan - 1:30 pm. Darshana Cultural Centre: Poetry Recitation. 3:00 pm. Kochi Pullepady IEI Bhavan: Workshop on 'Construction Regulations' organized by the Institution of Engineers India, Kochi Centre - Inauguration by Dr R Pradeep. 9:00 am. Chavara Cultural Centre: Media Kalotsavam organized jointly by Ernakulam Press Club and Chavara Cultural Centre - Registration 8:30 am, Inauguration - Sijoy Varghese - 9:30 am. TDM Hall: Vedanta Study Class led by Acharya K R Nambiar. 10:00 am. Theosophical Society, Pallimukku, Ernakulam: Study on Theosophy. 4:00 pm. Bharat Tourist Home: General Council meeting of Alpha Palliative Care. 7:30 pm. Palarivattom POC: Kerala History Congress Annual Meeting, Pavakoothu Award Distribution - Justice Cyriac Joseph. 3:00 pm. Ponnurunni Gramina Vayanashala: Conclusion of Aravam Reading Workshop, Various cultural programs presented by children. 4:00 pm. Ernakulam Grama Janasamooham: Ashtapadi, Musical Presentation, Devatha Dhyanam, Panchapadi, Deepapradeskashinam, Dolotsavam. 9:00 am. Changampuzha Cultural Centre: Bhavadrumam 3:00 pm, Kathakali - Kirmeervadham 5:30 pm. Kozhikode AG Road: Free Eye Check-up and Blood Group Determination Camp conducted jointly by Old Metal Dealers Association, Dr Srikanth Eye Hospital, and Calicut Blood Donors Forum. 9:00 am. Govindapuram Library: Balavedi Holiday Camp. 9:00 am. Mananchira Khadi Gramodyog Emporium: Khadi Summer School Fair. 10:00 am. Sukrutheendra Kalamandir: Inauguration of the Representative Conference of the Kerala Kshetra Samrakshana Samithi State Conference. Vivekamruthanandapuri Swami. 10:00 am. Chevarur Snehadeepam Library Hall: Lecture on "Artificial Intelligence and Malayalam Literature". Writer Sudeep Thekkepatt. 10:00 am. Kerala Lalithakala Academy Art Gallery: Painting exhibition by students of Calicut School of Fine Arts. 11:00 am. DCC Office: Reception for Minister T Siddique. 11:15 am. Mavoor Road Islamic Youth Centre Hall: Book Release. 2:00 pm. Kairali Vedi Auditorium: Kerala Mappila Kala Academy P H Smaraka Manava Maitri Award presentation to Dr M N Karassery - M K Muneer. 3:30 pm. YMCA Crossroads Hotel Marina Residency: Investment Awareness Program conducted by Investors Club of Calicut - Jaideep Menon. 5:00 pm. Beach Freedom Square: Global Reading Challenge - Page Against the Machine as part of UNESCO City of Literature. 5:00 pm.
